A.evidence: Catastrophic conversion: pervasive <|LOC_..|> coordinate tokens on nearly every line, the abstract sentence duplicated, and a massive degenerate loop repeating '.com/google-research/vision_transformer' hundreds/thousands of times (then 'vision_transforming-1..110'). Reading order and content are destroyed; math absent, no table reached. Worst by far.

B.evidence: Clean markdown, full prose, proper headings. All four equations rendered in LaTeX (minor: Eq. 2 'MSA' rendered as 'MS'; 'multihedead' typo). Table 1 present as a markdown table but columns are misaligned/split ('Hidden size' and 'D' become separate columns), shifting values. Complete and faithful overall.

C.evidence: Partially collapsed into raw JSON layout dumps: pages 1, 3 and the Table-1 page emit long [{"bbox":...,"category":...,"text":...}] arrays inline, badly breaking reading order. Other pages (Related Work) are clean markdown. Actual text, formulas and the Table-1 HTML are preserved but buried inside JSON. Heavy structure damage.

D.evidence: Plain-text output, no markdown heading markup but reading order intact and prose complete (some double-space artifacts). Table 1 is broken: header labels and only the Params values survive as separate lines, all Layers/Hidden/MLP/Heads numbers lost. Equations mangled: subscripts flattened, Eq. 4 mislabeled 'z3', 'MSA' garbled. No loops/garbage.

E.evidence: Excellent clean markdown with proper headings and faithful prose. All four equations in well-formed LaTeX $$ blocks. Main weakness: Table 1 (Vision Transformer variants) is dropped entirely, jumping from the Datasets paragraph straight to the VTAB text.

F.evidence: Clean markdown with correct headings; Table 1 rendered correctly as a markdown table with all values. But math is badly lost: equations 1-3 emitted as '<!-- formula-not-decoded -->' and Eq. 4 fragmented into stray tokens (y / = LN( / z / L / )). Prose faithful otherwise.

G.evidence: Near-faithful conversion. Clean markdown, correct headings, faithful prose. All four equations in proper numbered LaTeX. Table 1 rendered as a correct HTML table with all values. Figure image referenced. No loops or garbage.

H.evidence: Near-faithful conversion. Clean markdown, faithful prose, all four equations in correct LaTeX (with \tag). Table 1 correct as markdown table. Additionally preserves citation cross-reference links; minor formatting clutter from the link anchors but no content loss.
